userMessage: Hey, I'm feeling alone. What to do?
aiResponse: I'm here to listen and help. Feeling alone can be really tough, but there are things you can try to lift your mood and connect with others. Here are some ideas. 1. Reach out to a friend or family member. Talking to someone you trust can make a big difference. Even if it's just a quick call or text, it can help you feel more connected. 2. Join a community or group. Find a group that aligns with your interests, whether it's a book club, sports team, or hiking group. This can be a great way to meet new people and build relationships. 3. Volunteer. Helping others can give you a sense of purpose and fulfillment. Look for local volunteer opportunities.
